channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Oklahoma governor says he'll stop plan to collect kids' immigration status
item.description: Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt says he will stop a plan pushed by the state's top education official to collect the immigration status of children when they register for public school.
item.dc:creator: Sean Murphy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump’s remarks on Canada becoming the 51st state raise a lot of questions
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump has repeatedly said Canada should be the 51st U.S. state as he proposes to erase the 5,525-mile-long border that separates the two countries. The very notion is ludicrous to Canadians and the hurdles to transforming it into a state are sky high.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NYC mayor meets with Trump border czar over immigration enforcement
item.description: President Donald Trump’s border czar has met with New York City Mayor Eric Adams as the Republican administration pushes for more help detaining and deporting people accused of crimes.
item.dc:creator: Jake Offenhartz And Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: USAID employees ask a judge to keep blocking Trump's effort to pull most of them off the job
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Employees at the U.S. Agency for International Development asked a federal judge on Thursday to keep blocking an effort by President Donald Trump's administration to pull all but a fraction of worldwide staffers off the job. U.S.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST and ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump's pick for education chief sketches a roadmap for dismantling the department
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Linda McMahon on Thursday sketched out how key functions of the Education Department could be carved up to achieve President Donald Trump's goal of dismantling the agency, vowing to “reorient” the department while continuing some of its largest programs.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY and ANNIE MA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Denny's to close dozens more restaurants in 2025
item.description: Denny's was already planning to close dozens of locations this year. Now it's planning to close even more.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Trump's education secretary may be asked to dismantle the Education Department. Here's what it does
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — If Linda McMahon is confirmed as education secretary, President Donald Trump has said he wants her to “put herself out of a job.
item.dc:creator: ANNIE MA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Price fears for chocolatiers: Cocoa costs leave bitter taste for Valentine's Day
item.description: St. Valentine chocolates always seek to show how deep your love is. This year, it might just also show how deep your pockets are.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: A free speech dispute over a New England town's pastry shop painting heads to trial
item.description: CONCORD, N.H. (AP) — A First Amendment dispute over a bright painting that shows sunbeams shining down on a mountain range made of sprinkle-covered chocolate and strawberry doughnuts, a blueberry muffin, a cinnamon roll and other pastries is scheduled for trial Thursday.
item.dc:creator: KATHY McCORMACK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kamala Harris would be Democratic frontrunner for California governor in 2026, poll suggests
item.description: Former Vice President Harris would be the Democratic frontrunner for governor of California if she jumped into the Golden State’s 2026 race to replace Gov. Gavin Newsom (D), new polling shows.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, KRON4

item.title: Egg prices hit record high of $4.95, will likely keep climbing
item.description: Of course, that is only the nationwide average. A carton of eggs can cost $10 or more in some places. And specialized varieties, such as organic and cage-free eggs, are even more expensive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stars flee Kennedy Center groups after Trump seizes chair
item.description: President Donald Trump’s ascension to chair of the Kennedy Center on Wednesday led to multiple departures from the Washington, D.C., institution.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KRON4

item.title: At least 28 are hurt as driver plows into a demonstration in Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — A driver drove a car into a union demonstration in central Munich on Thursday, injuring at least 28 people including children, authorities said. Authorities said it was believed to be an attack, and the suspect — an Afghan asylum-seeker — was arrested.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: List: The more than 500 JOANN stores expected to close amid second bankruptcy filing
item.description: When JOANN filed for bankruptcy last month, the company said it expected all of its stores to remain open.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: Party City chain may soon turn into one of these familiar stores
item.description: The party supply chain announced in December it would be going out of business "immediately" and shuttering all locations.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Stranded astronauts could return soon
item.description: NASA announced Astronauts Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams could return to Earth, sooner than expected.
item.dc:creator: Vinay Simlot, ABC 4

item.title: John Legend says family is considering leaving California after wildfires
item.description: Last month's devastating wildfires may prompt John Legend and his wife, Chrissy Teigen, the latest celebrities to flee California.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Son of accused attempted Trump assassin has outburst in court after pleading guilty to serious charges
item.description: The son of a man accused of trying to kill then-presidential candidate Donald Trump will be sentenced in May for possessing child porn materials, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pilot killed in collision involving Mötley Crüe singer's plane identified as Marine Corps veteran
item.description: Joie Vitosky, 78, was certified as a flight engineer since 1978 and a pilot since 2019, according to FAA records.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Barker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds singer R. Kelly's convictions, 30-year prison term
item.description: R. Kelly’s racketeering and sex trafficking convictions, along with a 30-year prison sentence, were upheld Wednesday by a federal appeals court that concluded the singer exploited his fame for over a quarter century to sexually abuse girls and young women.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Italy prepares scenic, historic Olympic venues with games now one year away
item.description: This marks the first time Milan will host the Winter Olympics, with the opening ceremony scheduled at San Siro Stadium. The games will feature events in multiple locations, including hockey in a new arena in Milan and various alpine events in Cortina.
item.dc:creator: Matt Barnes, Fox 5

item.title: Christian aid groups weigh life-threatening choices about who to help after USAID funding pause
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In a warehouse in Haiti, nearly four metric tons of seeds cannot be distributed. Soon the planting season will be gone and with it, the best chance for those seeds to produce emergency food.
item.dc:creator: TIFFANY STANLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Monty the giant schnauzer wins Westminster dog show
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — This time, the giant schnauzer went the full Monty. After coming close in the last two years, Monty the giant schnauzer won the top prize at the Westminster Kennel Club dog show Tuesday night, leaving handler and co-owner Katie Bernardin almost too emotional to speak.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Audio from Titan submersible implosion released by NOAA
item.description: In the 23-second recording, the sound of static can be heard, followed by a booming noise — then more static.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, KRON4

item.title: Education report reveals which states have seen biggest drops in reading, math scores
item.description: While some schools are starting to claw back some of the ground lost due to pandemic-era learning disruptions, but there's still a ways to go, a new report finds.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Ozzy Osbourne's 'final show' with original Black Sabbath: What we know
item.description: The performance, called "The Back to the Beginning," will cap off an all-day event featuring sets from several iconic heavy metal acts.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Republican lawmakers urge Trump to respect federal court rulings
item.description: GOP lawmakers are growing increasingly worried about the nation plunging into a constitutional crisis if Trump ignores court orders halting his most aggressive actions.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, ABC 4

item.title: Trump welcomes Marc Fogel back to America after years in Russian prison and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump doubles down on plan to empty Gaza. This is what he has said and what's at stake
item.description: Behind U.S. President Donald Trump’s vows to turn Gaza into a “Riviera of the Middle East” lies a plan to forcibly drive a population from its land, rights groups say, warning it could be a war crime under international law.
item.dc:creator: LEE KEATH Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pope rebukes Trump administration over immigrant deportations and appears to aim directly at Vance
item.description: ROME (AP) — Pope Francis issued a major rebuke Tuesday to the Trump administration’s plans for mass deportations of migrants, warning that the forceful removal of people purely because of their illegal status deprives them of their inherent dignity and “will end badly.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: PBS closes DEI office to comply with executive order
item.description: PBS' move comes as Trump's FCC also continues to turn up the heat on public broadcasters over taxpayer funding and editorial direction.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, KRON4

item.title: Roses are red, violets are blue, 940 million flowers are traveling (through Miami) to you
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — If any husbands or boyfriends mess up Valentine's Day this week, it's not because of a shortage of flowers. In the run up to Feb. 14, agricultural specialists at Miami International Airport have processed about 940 million stems of cut flowers, according to U.S.
item.dc:creator: DAVID FISCHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: FEMA says it's halting payments for migrant housing in New York after Musk blasts money for hotels
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The acting head of the federal agency responsible for responding to disasters said Monday that he’s suspending payments sent to New York City to house migrants and that staff who made them will be held accountable, after Elon Musk blasted the transactions on his social media platfo
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nelly delivers hits at 'Homecoming' Super Bowl week concert in historic New Orleans restaurant
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Nelly brought his signature St. Louis swagger to a New Orleans institution, turning a nearly seven-decade-old restaurant into a Super Bowl week party. The multi-Grammy winner packed Brennan’s on Friday night, delivering a hit-filled set at the h.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, Fox 5
